macro.title: Mortgage performance steady in May as calendar drives delinquency bump
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: Americans Across Party Lines Back Policies to Improve Housing Affordability: Redfin Survey
macro.what: Most Republicans and Democrats believe there should be federal policies in place to make housing more affordable, according to a recent Redfin survey
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Falcone-backed AmeriCraft targets Southeast luxury communities
housing.what: AmeriCraft Homes, a new for-sale builder backed by veteran developer Art Falcone, has launched a multi-state platform to deliver “attainable luxury” communities in Florida and the Carolinas, with a hospitality-style customer experience
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Bright MLS joins Google home listings via HouseCanary
housing.what: Bright MLS plans to send opt-in brokerage listings into Google search through HouseCanary ComeHome.com, expanding listing distribution.
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

housing.title: BOK Financial’s Michael Merritt breaks down ROAD to Housing Act impact on homebuyers
housing.what: Michael Merritt, BOK Financial's senior vice president of customer care and default mortgage servicing, told HousingWire the bill represents a “good start, but not everything."
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Mamdani wins rent freeze for stabilized NYC apartments
housing.what: New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani delivered on a key campaign promise to freeze rents for many residents
housing.why: Rent moves feed shelter inflation and multifamily fundamentals.
housing.market: Rising rents help MF REITs; falling rents ease inflation but pressure NOI.

housing.title: Bill Gaul named data ambassador at GDX and IMLSF
housing.what: GDX – Global Data Exchange and the International MLS Forum (IMLSF) have appointed Bill Gaul as their official ambassador for new construction and builder data, the organizations announced
housing.why: Supply pipeline sets future inventory and construction activity.
housing.market: Stronger pipeline aids suppliers; oversupply later can weigh on pricing.

housing.title: Fewer Homeowners Are Listing as Spring Market Ends With a Whimper, Not a Bang
housing.why: Price trend signals wealth effects and buyer/seller power.
housing.market: Firm prices help builder margins; softness hits comps and sentiment.

housing.title: Congress Takes Historic Step on Housing Affordability with Bipartisan ROAD to Housing Act
housing.what: Passed unanimously out of the Senate Banking Committee, the ROAD to Housing Act embraces solutions to the housing affordability crisis like zoning reform and streamlining rules to encourage more homebuilding
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

housing.title: Flood-Prone Parts of America Are Losing Residents at Nearly Twice Last Year’s Rate
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: NYC Suburbs and the Bay Area Are This Spring’s Most Competitive Housing Markets
housing.what: More than half of homes are selling above asking price in Newark, San Francisco, San Jose and Nassau County, making them the most competitive markets in the nation
housing.why: Price trend signals wealth effects and buyer/seller power.
housing.market: Firm prices help builder margins; softness hits comps and sentiment.

housing.title: U.S. Home-Price Growth Accelerated in May, Fueled by April’s Brief Mortgage-Rate Reprieve
housing.what: Home prices rose 0.3% month over month on a seasonally adjusted basis
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

notables.title: Portals and brokerages escalate real estate vertical integration race
notables.what: Portals and brokerages expand across the stack to defend engagement and margins, as AI makes shopping and expertise more portable.
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

notables.title: ARA adds REMAX president Chris Lim to board
notables.what: ARA adds REMAX president Chris Lim and investor Andrew Dodge to its board and offers REMAX agents a free first year membership.
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

notables.title: MISMO releases data mappings for key VA eligibility forms
notables.what: MISMO published data mappings for VA Forms 26-1880 and 26-1817, giving VA lenders a standard way to digitize and automate eligibility checks.
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

notables.title: How to defend commission using value not tools
notables.what: This script free approach helps agents answer commission pressure by coaching sellers on execution, not arguing about tools or fees.
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.
